content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.03%, Bank Nifty -1.05%, VIX +8.79% to 18.32 — broad weakness with defensive rotation into IT, Pharma, FMCG, Healthcare. Sector dispersion is wide; large-cap defensives with strong Q4 prints (COFORGE, BAJAJ-AUTO, TATACONSUM, LAURUSLABS, DABUR, MARICO) are bid while Realty, PSU Banks, Energy, Auto bleed. Existing book is heavily tilted toward defensives — broadly the right side of today's tape; manage winners aggressively rather than chase further.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23845,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "GOLDBEES -1.1%, CMP 123.75 vs SL 121.00 (~2.2% buffer). Gold in short-term correction (1m -7.45%) but structural inflows intact. SL respected; no MODIFY needed — stored SL already tight."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 832.00,
      "new_target": 860.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "MARICO +3.2% unrealized, CMP 844.75. Stored SL already at 832 = breakeven+1.5%, target 860 (~+4.9%). Per Rule trail-discipline (b), trail to max(entry, LTP-2%) = max(820, 828) = 828 — but stored 832 is already TIGHTER than that, so no upgrade needed. CMP-SL gap = 1.51% ≥ 1% floor. HOLD configuration. Emitting HOLD via position_actions instead — see below."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1360.00,
      "new_target": 1450.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "COFORGE +9.7%, CMP 1375.50, stored SL 1360 already locks in +8% gain. CMP-SL gap = 1.14% (just above 1% floor — acceptable). Q4 blockbuster + Sabre deal + Cigniti merger intact. Stored SL = proposed new_sl, so this is a no-op MODIFY — converting to HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SRF flat, CMP 2787 vs entry 2785. Below +2% trail threshold. Stored SL 2740 (-1.6%) sized appropriately given Morgan Stanley underweight overhang and high P/E. Hold structure intact; Q4 chemicals guidance 15-20% supportive."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "POLYCAB -0.5%, CMP 9058 vs SL 8950 (~1.2% buffer). FY26 PAT +32%, record dividend Rs 47, market share +3-4pp. Stock at 52w high zone; intact thesis. SL respects normal noise; no panic-trim despite capital goods sector wobble — POLYCAB is wires/cables, not ABB/SIEMENS-type capex play."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BAJAJ-AUTO -1.3%, CMP 10604 vs SL 10440 (~1.6% buffer). Massive catalyst stack: Rs 12000 tender buyback (+13% premium to CMP) + Rs 150 dividend, record date May 29. Buyback floor supports price. SL absorbs normal Auto sector wobble (-1.28% today). Hold to buyback record."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "DABUR -1.7%, CMP 479 vs SL 468 (~2.3% buffer). Q4 PAT +15.75%, FY27 guidance upgrade to low-double-digit, dividend Rs 5.50. Intraday wobble within SL absorption budget — Rule 17 discipline, do not front-run SL. Thesis intact, hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1255.00,
      "new_target": 1320.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "LAURUSLABS +3.6%, CMP 1270.80, stored SL 1255 locks in +2.4% gain. CMP-SL gap = 1.24% (above 1% floor). FY26 PAT +148%, EBITDA margin 26.8%, CDMO +36%, GLP-1 peptide catalyst. Stored SL already breakeven+; proposed = stored, no-op MODIFY → convert to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "TATACONSUM -0.3%, CMP 1239.90 vs entry 1248. Position fresh; entered into Q4 earnings beat +21% PAT, record OPM, Rs 10 dividend. Faded from intraday high 1253 but well within SL 1198 (-4%) budget. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "CGPOWER -0.1%, CMP 863 vs SL 850 (~1.5% buffer). Q4 PAT +32%, order book +61% YoY, Tallgrass US data center order — bullish stack. Holding up vs weak capital goods peers (ABB -11.4%, SIEMENS -6.7%) — relative strength confirms thesis. SL intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "APOLLOHOSP fresh entry at 8095, CMP 8095 — flat. HSBC Buy TP 9000, Q4 board May 20 (>3 sessions, no binary rule triggered). SL 7950 (-1.8%). Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 26,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 1875.00,
      "stop_loss": 1830.00,
      "target": 1950.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "SUNPHARMA at 52w high 1875 (broke 1857 prior high), Pharma sector hitting fresh 52w high (best performer today +0.49%). Organon $11.75B acquisition catalyst, Q3 PAT +16% YoY. Q4 results May 20-21 (>3 sessions, not in binary window). INR weakness tailwind for US generics. Entry 1875, SL 1830 (-2.4%), target 1950 (+4%). Risk 45 / reward 75 = R:R 1.67 ✓. Position size ~₹48,750 = 4.85% of capital. Risk budget: 4.85% × 2.4% = 0.12% ✓. Defensive add aligning with day's risk-off rotation; deployment moves from 45% → ~50%, still well below 80% soft target."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "MCX",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 6,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 8400.00,
      "stop_loss": 8150.00,
      "target": 8900.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "MCX +4.15% today on Q4FY26 PAT +291% YoY, revenue tripled. Crude/commodity volatility drives volumes (VIX +8.79%, India risk-off tape favors commodity-exchange flows). Independent thesis vs existing book (no overlap with FMCG/IT/Pharma/Healthcare cluster). Note: 8400 is estimated entry pending verification — using LIMIT at recent level. SL 8150 (-3%), target 8900 (+5.95%), R:R 1.98 ✓. Position ~₹50,400 = 5% of capital. Risk budget 5% × 3% = 0.15% ✓. NOTE: deferring this — without confirmed CMP data this entry is speculative; flagging to watchlist instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "DRREDDY",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results tomorrow May 12 — binary event within 1 session. Rule 11 default: no new entry into binary window. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "INFY",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "reasoning": "INFY near 52w low 1149, MACD bearish, FY27 guidance subdued at 2.5% CC midpoint. IT defensive narrative is sentimental — chart is in a downtrend. Pass on entry; SUNPHARMA fills the defensive add slot with cleaner setup."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HCLTECH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "reasoning": "HCLTECH near 52w low 1181, oversold but no reversal confirmation. Catching-falling-knife setup; wait for higher-low structure before contrarian entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "reasoning": "Up +7.33% intraday but Q4 PAT -15% YoY (even adjusting for base effect, growth lagging Metropolis/Vijaya/Thyrocare). P/E 54.8 stretched, broker target dispersion Rs 1300-1860 signals no consensus. Pass — chase risk on intraday spike."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TORNTPHARM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "reasoning": "Already adequate Pharma/Healthcare cluster exposure with LAURUSLABS + APOLLOHOSP + potential SUNPHARMA add (3 names). Per Rule 10 cluster discipline, no additional Pharma admit this session."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BIOCON",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "reasoning": "Same cluster discipline — Pharma already represented. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "PERSISTENT",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "reasoning": "IT mid-cap; COFORGE already provides differentiated IT exposure with the only large-deal-driven catalyst in the segment. No additional IT admit."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "NIFTYBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "reasoning": "Broad-market exposure on a day Nifty -1% with VIX +8.79%; book already substantially long defensives that are outperforming the index. Adding NIFTYBEES would dilute alpha. Pass."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 121 absorbing normal noise; gold structural inflows intact despite short-term correction."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 832 already locks in +1.5% gain at entry 820. CMP-SL gap 1.5% above floor. No further trail needed yet — let it run toward 860 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1360 locks in ~+8% gain. CMP-SL gap 1.14%. At target 1450 watch for partial book; for now let it run on Cigniti merger + Sabre catalyst."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat; SL 2740 sized for MS Underweight overhang. No trail trigger."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 8950 (-1.2% from CMP) absorbing capital goods sector noise; FY26 print + Rs 47 dividend catalyst intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Rs 12000 buyback record date May 29 provides price floor. SL 10440 (-1.6%) absorbs Auto sector weakness today."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat + FY27 guidance upgrade; SL 468 (-2.3%) within noise budget. Do not front-run SL on intraday wobble."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1255 = breakeven+2.4%; CMP-SL gap 1.24%. CDMO +36%, GLP-1 catalyst — let it run."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Fresh entry, faded from intraday high but well within SL budget. Q4 print and FMCG sector tailwind intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Relative strength vs ABB/SIEMENS confirms thesis. Order book +61% YoY, Tallgrass US data center deal — fresh catalyst pipeline."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Fresh entry at 8095, HSBC TP 9000. Q4 board May 20 (8 sessions out, not binary window). SL 7950."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "MCX deferred — strong fundamentals (+291% PAT, crude/commodity volatility tailwind) but no CMP confirmed in data; will revisit on next pulse with actual price. DRREDDY hard-passed per binary rule (Q4 tomorrow). HCLTECH/INFY/PERSISTENT held off — IT sector defensive narrative not yet confirmed by chart structure (INFY/HCL still near 52w lows). LALPATHLAB passed on chase risk + growth lag vs peers. Pharma cluster (LAURUSLABS held + SUNPHARMA proposed add + APOLLOHOSP held) approaching cluster cap — no further Pharma admits.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployment 45% → ~50% post-SUNPHARMA. Book is well-positioned for today's tape: defensives (FMCG MARICO/DABUR/TATACONSUM, Pharma LAURUSLABS/APOLLOHOSP, IT COFORGE) outperforming the falling index. Trailing SLs already locked in gains on COFORGE (+8%), MARICO (+1.5%), LAURUSLABS (+2.4%). 7 of 11 positions have Q4 catalyst within last 5 sessions (all positive). HFCL pending MIS order from prior session (7670m = ~5 days old) should be cancelled — stale, no longer relevant. Rolling 5-day win rate 13% is concerning but PF 0.9x and small net loss -₹898 means losses are being contained; today's positioning is structurally improved."
}
